description: Identifies ElastiCache cost waste from excessive replicas, excessive shards, oversized node types, or missing reserved node coverage while protecting availability and performance.

cost.pricing_source: Static fallback estimate. Prefer AWS Pricing MCP, AWS Pricing API, or cost_report region-specific pricing when available.
cost.note: ElastiCache nodes are billed per node-hour. Pricing varies by engine, node type, region, reserved node coverage, and serverless/node-based deployment model.

severity_rules.name: excess_replicas_with_safe_headroom
severity_rules.condition: replicas_per_shard > min_replicas_per_shard_for_ha AND cache_hit_rate_pct_avg >= cache_hit_rate_pct_min AND memory_p95 <= database_memory_usage_pct_p95_max AND evictions == 0 AND cpu_p95 <= cpu_utilization_pct_p95_max AND replication_lag_p95 <= replication_lag_seconds_p95_max
severity_rules.description: Replica count appears higher than required while memory, eviction, CPU, and replication metrics show safe headroom. Preserve at least one replica per shard when HA/failover is required.

severity_rules.name: oversized_node_type
severity_rules.condition: memory_p95 <= database_memory_usage_pct_p95_max AND cpu_p95 <= cpu_utilization_pct_p95_max AND network_p95 <= network_utilization_pct_p95_max AND evictions == 0
severity_rules.description: Node type may be larger than required. Downsize only after validating memory, CPU, network, connection headroom, and rollback plan.

severity_rules.name: excess_shard_count_review
severity_rules.condition: cluster_mode_enabled == true AND per_shard_memory_p95_low == true AND per_shard_cpu_p95_low == true AND traffic_pattern_is_steady == true
severity_rules.description: Shard count may exceed workload needs. Reducing shards is higher risk than reducing replicas and requires key distribution and migration review.

severity_rules.name: reserved_node_coverage_candidate
severity_rules.description: Steady retained ElastiCache capacity may benefit from reserved node coverage. Model commitments before purchase.

severity_rules.name: performance_risk_blocks_downsize
severity_rules.condition: evictions > 0 OR memory_p95 > database_memory_usage_pct_p95_max OR cpu_p95 > cpu_utilization_pct_p95_max OR replication_lag_p95 > replication_lag_seconds_p95_max
severity_rules.description: Performance or capacity risk evidence exists. Do not downsize until memory pressure, evictions, CPU, network, and replication lag are reviewed.

validation_before_downsize: Check memory average, p95, max, and fragmentation where available.
Check evictions, CPU, network, current connections, and replication lag.
Preserve Multi-AZ and automatic failover requirements.
Check reserved node coverage before changing node family or count.
reporting: Separate node-hour savings from reserved node purchase recommendations.
Report confidence based on metric coverage and HA evidence.
